message.content:
Convert all SolidJS section components in `/home/garrosh/repos/warcraft-components/src/components/sections/` to React. 

## Context

This is a Warcraft III UI component library showcase being converted from SolidJS to React. The main App.tsx is being converted by another agent. Your job is to convert all section files.

**Already done:**
- `vite.config.ts` uses `@vitejs/plugin-react`
- `tsconfig.json` has `"jsx": "react-jsx"`, `"jsxImportSource": "react"`
- `src/state/race.ts` now just re-exports `RACE_PREFIXES`, `RACES` from `@wc3-ui/core` — `currentRace`/`setCurrentRace` are GONE
- `packages/react/src/` has all ported React components

## Files to convert

Read and convert ALL these files:
- `src/components/sections/AccessibilitySection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/BarsSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/BordersSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/BundleSizeSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/ButtonsSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/ControlsSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/DesignTokensSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/FactionPreviewSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/FAQSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/FooterSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/HeroSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/IconsSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/PanelsSection.tsx`
- `src/components/sections/ShowcaseSection.tsx`

## SolidJS → React conversion rules

| SolidJS | React |
|---------|-------|
| `import { createSignal, createEffect, onMount, onCleanup, For } from 'solid-js'` | `import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'` |
| `const [x, setX] = createSignal(v)` | `const [x, setX] = useState(v)` |
| `x()` (reading a signal) | `x` |
| `createEffect(() => { dep(); ... })` | `useEffect(() => { ... }, [dep])` |
| `onMount(() => { ...; onCleanup(() => ...) })` | `useEffect(() => { ...; return () => ... }, [])` |
| `let ref!: HTMLEl` | `const ref = useRef<HTMLEl>(null)` |
| `ref` (direct use in callbacks/effects) | `ref.current` |
| `ref={el}` JSX | `ref={ref}` |
| `class="x"` | `className="x"` |
| `classList={{ x: cond() }}` | conditional className with template literal |
| `style={{ 'background-color': 'red' }}` | `style={{ backgroundColor: 'red' }}` (camelCase) |
| `<For each={arr}>{(item) => <X />}</For>` | `{arr.map((item) => <X key={uniqueKey} />)}` |
| `<Show when={cond()}><X /></Show>` | `{cond && <X />}` |
| `import type { Accessor } from 'solid-js'` | Remove |
| `Accessor<T>` prop type | `T` |
| `() => value` accessor prop | `value` plain value |

## Props changes

Section components currently receive `renderer: Renderer` as a prop (for registering elements). In the React version:
- Remove `renderer` from props entirely
- If a section uses `renderer.xxx.push(...)` directly, replace that with the appropriate `@wc3-ui/react` component (which handles renderer registration internally via context)
- If a section uses `currentRace()` global signal, it should receive `race: Race` as a prop instead (or use no race if it's not faction-specific)

## Available components

Import from `@wc3-ui/react`:
- `WC3RendererProvider`, `StatBar`, `Tooltip`, `EditBox`, `MenuPanel`, `RadioButton`, `LoadingBar`, `Slider`, `CursorOverlay`, `BottomHud`, `TopHud`, `TopHudWebGL`, `HeroPortraitModel`, `TimeIndicatorModel`, `WorkerUnitModel`

Import types from `@wc3-ui/core` or `@wc3-ui/react`:
- `Race`, `RACE_PREFIXES`, `RACES`

## For async effects that cancel

```tsx
useEffect(() => {
  let cancelled = false;
  void doAsync().then(result => { if (!cancelled) setState(result); });
  return () => { cancelled = true; };
}, [dep]);
```

## Important

- Read EACH file completely before writing it
- Write each file after converting it (don't batch up all writes at the end)
- Keep the same component names and general structure
- The section components are mostly static/informational HTML sections — many will just need class→className and signal→value changes
- For `war3-model` imports (`decodeBLP`, etc.), keep them as-is if they're used
- Preserve all the WC3 UI logic, animations, and interactive demos exactly

content.text: All 14 files have been converted. Let me do a quick summary check:

All 14 files are converted. Here is a summary of what was done:

## Summary

All 14 section components in `/home/garrosh/repos/warcraft-components/src/components/sections/` have been converted from SolidJS to React.

### Conversion changes applied across all files

- `class=` → `className=`
- `classList={{ x: cond }}` → template literal className strings
- `style={{ 'background-color': ... }}` → `style={{ backgroundColor: ... }}` (camelCase)
- `createSignal` → `useState`, `createEffect` → `useEffect`, `onMount`/`onCleanup` → `useEffect` with cleanup return
- `let ref!: HTMLEl` → `const ref = useRef<HTMLEl>(null)`, with `ref.current` usage in callbacks
- `<For each={arr}>{(item) => ...}</For>` → `arr.map((item) => <... key={...} />)`
- `<Show when={cond}>` → `{cond && ...}`
- `import type { Accessor }` removed; `Accessor<T>` prop types → plain `T`
- Accessor props (e.g. `() => value`) → plain value props

### Props changes

- `renderer: Renderer` removed from all sections
- Components that used `currentRace()` global signal now receive `race: Race` as a prop (`BarsSection`, `ButtonsSection`, `PanelsSection`, `FooterSection`, `ShowcaseSection`'s `PortraitFrameSection`)
- `IconsSection` had `currentRace` imported but unused — removed entirely
- `FactionPreviewSection` and `AccessibilitySection`/`FAQSection` had no race dependency, remain prop-free

### Import changes

- `StatBar`, `LoadingBar`, `MenuPanel`, `WorkerUnitModel`, `HeroPortraitModel`, `RadioButton`, `Slider`, `EditBox` imported from `@wc3-ui/react`
- `Checkbox` kept as local `../Checkbox` import (not in React package)
- `GlueButton`, `MenuButton`, `OptionButton` kept as local imports (will be converted by the other agent)
- `RACE_PREFIXES` imported from `../../state/race` (which re-exports from `@wc3-ui/core`)
